notes: Two-leg USDJPY/AUDJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar; DEV Sharpe was positive but OOS net Sharpe was negative. It is the next unbuilt rank-26 tail pair after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739/12747/12749/12751/12756/12758/12760/12762/12764/12765/12766/12768/12770 baskets.
